{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged dream madra
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] prepared a scripted box of stable, [[Forged dream madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
